text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I escort an unwell Inari One to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Can't have my partner worryin' about me. I'll
focus on restin' up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whoa, where the heck am I? This some
kinda festival?

text_block_list.name: Fox-Mask Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yo-ho, yo-ho! Well well, if it isn't the boss lady
Inari herself!

text_block_list.name: Fox-Mask Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Quick, over here! I prepared a specially-made
Inari mini shrine just for you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whazzat? Just for me?! And looks like it's made from... fried tofu?!

text_block_list.name: Fox-Mask Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! A giant piece of fried tofu! Use all the energy ya want—when you get hungry, just take out a big ol' bite! A stylish and tasty shrine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh, I'm not so sure 'bout the stylish part...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But if it's a mikoshi shrine, no way am I just
standin' around to watch! Scoot over, I'mma help
hoist it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wagh! It's even filled with bonito broth! Now this
is one helluva fine shrine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right, we're doin' this the Edo way! C'mon now!
Heave-ho! Heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's the great Inari! Fried tofu wahoo! O
great deity wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Listena the crowd gettin' all excited! Hehe, this is what I call a festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Was I dreamin'? Aw, maaan...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But whatever! Dream or not, I'm feelin' pumped.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Dunno who or what's in charge of givin' out
dreams, but that was some real top-tier stuff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One returns from the infirmary looking like a
whole new person!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Hey, outta the way! What's with all these
people?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gah, damn it! I'm gettin' swept away by the
crowd!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...What the heck? That was a weird dream.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aw, damn it! Feels just like when I got lost as a
kid. Now I can't relax!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Inari One returns from the infirmary
looking slightly worse for wear.
